recommendations.title: Drake & Josh Go Hollywood
recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Adventure, TV Movie, Crime
recommendations.overview: When Drake and Josh accidentally send their little sister Megan on a plane to L.A., they soon find themselves in the middle of a dangerous situation.

recommendations.title: #Horror
recommendations.overview: Inspired by actual events, a group of 12 year old girls face a night of horror when the compulsive addiction of an online social media game turns a moment of cyber bullying into a night of insanity.

recommendations.title: Bad Match
recommendations.overview: An internet-dating playboy's life spirals out of control after meeting a woman online.

recommendations.title: Catfish

recommendations.title: Trust

recommendations.title: Z
recommendations.overview: A family find themselves terrorized by their eight-year-old son's imaginary friend.

recommendations.title: Winter Spring Summer or Fall
recommendations.overview: Remi and Barnes, two very different teenagers, meet by chance in the winter of their senior year, then spend four  days together over the course of a year that will change their lives forever.

recommendations.title: Correspondence
recommendations.overview: The relationship between Ed, a married astronomer and Amy, his lover, who spend their years apart, is based only on phone calls and texts. One day Amy begins noticing something strange in Ed's messages.
